---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, enhancement, or new tool integration
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves

Describe the user-facing problem or workflow that's painful today. Who
is affected? How often do they hit it?

Example: "When I import a STEP file larger than 500 MB, the app freezes
for 30 seconds with no feedback."

## Proposed solution

What should happen? A rough sketch is fine — we'll work out details
in design / RFC.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem you thought about, and why you'd
pick this one.

## Scope check

- Is this a **small change**? → this issue is enough
- Is this a **large change** (new tool, API change, new workspace crate)?
  → please file an RFC in `rfcs/` instead of / in addition to this
  issue. See [rfcs/README.md](../../rfcs/README.md).

## Context

- Which physics / tool this relates to (if any)
- Reference links, papers, similar features in other tools
- Your use case (so we understand priority)
